definitions.text: slik at noe synker eller blir ødelagt
definitions.translation: so that something sinks or is destroyed

examples.no: det store skipet rente fiskebåten i senk
examples.en: the large ship rammed the fishing boat and sank it

examples.no: firmaet ble kjørt i senk av den nye ledelsen
examples.en: the company was run into the ground by the new management

definitions.text: slik at noen blir helt utslitt
definitions.translation: so that someone becomes completely exhausted

examples.en: he trained himself into the ground
she talked them into the ground
the politician charmed the voters into submission
